Test Scenario: Create Zoho lead and store returned lead id for manufacturer
Preconditions: Zoho API client returns success with Lead ID; manufacturer and portal user IDs are available
Test Steps: Call ZohoLeadsService.createLead with registration lead payload
Test Data: First_Name=John; Last_Name=Doe; Email=john@example.com; Mobile=+919876543210; Company=ABC Pvt Ltd; Lead_Status=New; Lead_Source=Portal; City=Hyderabad; State=Telangana; Country=India; GBC_s_Services=Greenpro
Expected Result: POST /crm/v8/Leads is called with expected payload; zoho_lead_mappings is upserted with manufacturerId, vendorId, portalUserId, and zohoLeadId; success sync log is created

Test Scenario: Handle Zoho lead creation API failure
Test Steps: Call ZohoLeadsService.createLead with valid minimum payload
Expected Result: Service throws BadGatewayException; failed sync log is created; lead mapping is not upserted

Test Scenario: Handle successful Zoho response without Lead ID
Preconditions: Zoho API client returns ok=true but details.id is missing
Test Steps: Call ZohoLeadsService.createLead with valid minimum payload
Expected Result: Service throws InternalServerErrorException; failed sync log is created

Test Scenario: Convert registered vendor lead and store Contact
Test Data: zoho_lead_mappings contains zohoLeadId for manufacturer; Zoho function returns Contacts, Deals, and Accounts IDs
Latest Status: Zoho vendor_contact function is called; zoho_deal_mappings is upserted with zohoContactId, zohoDealId, zohoAccountId, manufacturerId, and vendorId; success sync log is created

Test Scenario: Skip conversion when Lead mapping is missing
Preconditions: No zoho_lead_mappings record exists for manufacturer
Expected Result: Service throws BadGatewayException; skipped sync log is created; Zoho function is not called

Test Scenario: Update Zoho Potentials with approved payment details
Preconditions: zoho_deal_mappings contains zohoDealId for manufacturer; Zoho API client returns success
Test Steps: Call ZohoDealsService.updateDealPaymentDetails after admin approves vendor payment
Test Data: id=1110053000005094008; Quote_Number=454545; GSTIN=876587687y6; Amount=8989; Transaction_Number=98776654321; Payment_Mode=online
Expected Result: PUT /crm/v8/Potentials is called with mapped payment payload; deal mapping rawSnapshot is updated; success sync log is created

Preconditions: zoho_deal_mappings contains zohoDealId; Zoho API client returns ok=false
Expected Result: Service throws BadGatewayException; failed sync log is created with Zoho error code and message
